mentions.note: Value retailer; real products; on Cramer's list of understandable, in-demand companies.
Trade-down retail theme; more adventuresome investor play; better for consumers watching budgets.
Off game alongside DG but has track record of surprising upside; don't dismiss but stay cautious.
Plunged 4.2%; expected uptick as economy slows failed to materialize; suggests deep consumer distress.
Ideal shopping venue for price-conscious consumers given merchandise inflation; time-honored Wall Street proxy bought when economy deteriorates, not sold.
Rallied 18% showing consumer resilience, not weakness; adapted sub-$2 pricing (85% sales mix) for budget shoppers; model works across all macro environments.
Reported blowout quarter yesterday; poor clientele weighed down by high fuel and inflation yet company delivered sensational numbers and bright forecast

Lower-income consumers strapped; sales declining despite economic weakness. CEO cited 'dynamic consumer environment' and reduced spending. Dollar tree value proposition destroyed by inflation and tariffs.
